message: fix(ci): checkout with submodules for vendor/gitmode and vendor/zerobuf

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,8 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: true
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
@@ -23,6 +25,8 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: true
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
@@ -35,6 +39,8 @@ jobs:
     needs: [typecheck, test]
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: true
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
